response.justification: Bogdan has exceptional technical depth, open-source contributions, and cross-platform experience aligned with the role, but lacks demonstrated leadership in IT consulting, formal project management, and UML expertise, and his German proficiency is only basic — a critical gap given the C1 requirement.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact (e.g., GISCollective)
Proven full-stack expertise across Linux, Python-adjacent (Node.js/DLang), and cloud-native tooling
Strong track record of mentoring, workshops, and technical communication
concerns: German language proficiency is listed as 'Basic', falling far short of required C1
No explicit evidence of IT architecture design, UML modeling, or client advisory experience
Lacks documented experience in technical project management or consulting delivery models
